title: Navamed - Healthcare Navigation Platform
problem: Patients don't know where to seek care. Navigation through the healthcare system is confusing and leads to inappropriate utilization.
solution: Digital health navigation platform helping patients find appropriate care based on symptoms and local availability.
regulatory_notes: Health navigation tool, not medical device.
varden_fit: High — care navigation is core to Varden's value proposition. Direct overlap.
notes: Norwegian care navigation. Similar model to Varden.
